languages.text: "Отец, инквизитор Диодас не глупец. Я не думаю, что эти безумцы служат ему. Давайте позволим им объясниться". {n}Лишь цвет глаз выдает родство заговорившей женщины и полумеханического чудовища рядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Отец, погодите. Инквизитор Диодас не глуп, он бы не послал подобных безумцев. Я прошу вас не рубить сгоряча. Дайте им представиться". {n}Лишь голубые глаза выдают родство заговорившей женщины и полумеханического чудовища рядом.{/n}
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Отец, инквизитор Диодас не глупец. Я не думаю, что эти безумцы служат ему. Давайте позволим им объясниться". {n}Лишь цвет глаз выдает родство заговорившей женщины и полумеханического чудовища рядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

"Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

"Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

languages.text: “父亲，审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙可不傻。我不相信这些疯子在为他效力。我们应该听听他们要如何解释。”{n}只有通过女子眼眸的颜色，才能看出她与身旁那个半机械怪物之间的血缘关系。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “父亲，审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙可不傻。我不相信这些疯子在为他效力。我们应该听听他们要如何解释。”{n}只有通过女子眼眸的颜色，才能看出她与身旁那个半机械怪物之间的血缘关系。{/n}

languages.text: « Père, l'inquisiteur af Irramon est tout sauf un imbécile, et je doute que ces illuminés travaillent pour lui. Nous devrions leur laisser une chance de s'expliquer. » {n}Seule la couleur des yeux de la femme trahit son lien de parenté avec le monstre à demi mécanique qui se tient à ses côtés.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Père, l'inquisiteur af Irramon est tout sauf un imbécile, et je doute que ces illuminés travaillent pour lui. Nous devrions leur laisser une chance de s'expliquer. » {n}Seule la couleur des yeux de la femme trahit son lien de parenté avec le monstre à demi mécanique qui se tient à ses côtés.{/n}

languages.text: "Baba, Engizisyoncu af İrramon aptal değildir. Bu delilerin ona hizmet ettiğine ihtimal vermiyorum. Kendilerini açıklamaları için onlara şans tanımalıyız." {n}Kadın ile yanında duran yarı mekanik canavar arasındaki akrabalığı ele veren tek şey, gözlerinin rengi.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Baba, Engizisyoncu af İrramon aptal değildir. Bu delilerin ona hizmet ettiğine ihtimal vermiyorum. Kendilerini açıklamaları için onlara şans tanımalıyız." {n}Kadın ile yanında duran yarı mekanik canavar arasındaki akrabalığı ele veren tek şey, gözlerinin rengi.{/n}

languages.text: «Padre, el Inquisidor af Irramon no es ningún necio. No creo que estos lunáticos estén a su servicio. Démosles la oportunidad de explicarse». {n}Solo el color de los ojos de la mujer traiciona su relación con el monstruo medio mecánico que tiene a su lado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Padre, el Inquisidor af Irramon no es ningún necio. No creo que estos lunáticos estén a su servicio. Démosles la oportunidad de explicarse». {n}Solo el color de los ojos de la mujer traiciona su relación con el monstruo medio mecánico que tiene a su lado.{/n}

languages.text: "Vater, Inquisitor af Irramon ist kein Narr. Ich glaube nicht, dass ihm diese Verrückten dienen. Wir sollten ihnen eine Chance geben, sich zu erklären." {n}Allein die Augenfarbe der Frau verrät ihre Verwandtschaft zu dem halbmechanischen Monster neben ihr.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Father, Inquisitor af Irramon is no fool. I do not believe these lunatics serve him. We should give them a chance to explain themselves." {n}Only the colour of the woman's eyes betrays the kinship between her and the half-mechanical monster beside her.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Vater, Inquisitor af Irramon ist kein Narr. Ich glaube nicht, dass ihm diese Verrückten dienen. Wir sollten ihnen eine Chance geben, sich zu erklären." {n}Allein die Augenfarbe der Frau verrät ihre Verwandtschaft zu dem halbmechanischen Monster neben ihr.{/n}

languages.text: 「父、インキジター・イラモンは愚か者ではない。この狂人たちが彼に仕えるとは信じがたい。彼らに説明する機会を与えよう。」{n}女の目は機械半人型と血縁関係にあることを示している。{/n}
